query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE id = 1) as est_1_exists,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE id = 2) as est_2_exists,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 1) as prods_est_1,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 2) as prods_est_2;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE id = 1) as est_1_exists,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE id = 2) as est_2_exists,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 1) as prods_est_1,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 2) as prods_est_2;
